headline: HK Health Bureau plans mandatory contact lens product registration
summary: The Health Bureau plans to submit a legislative proposal to LegCo in 2026 requiring contact lenses to be listed and pass registration review with the Department of Health. Contact lens purchases without a prescription remain legal. Column co-authored by the HK Association of Private Practice Optometrists. Raises compliance bar for parallel importers and unregistered online sellers; brands with established official-channel registration (Acuvue, Alcon, B&L) gain relative edge over grey-market competition. LegCo bill timetable expected to firm up later in 2026.

headline: Chief Executive confirms HK Centre for Medical Products Regulation to be established in 2026
summary: CE John Lee confirmed the HK Centre for Medical Products Regulation will be established in 2026 with an independent drug and device approval mechanism as HK moves toward becoming an international health and medical innovation hub. Reinforces the Feb 2026 registration proposal; official-channel brands better positioned than grey-market sellers.

headline: Bausch + Lomb Thailand partners with KT Optic for World Cup 2026 "See Better. Live Better." campaign
summary: B+L Thailand GM announced partnership with KT Optic premium optical chain for a World Cup-themed campaign featuring former Thai national team striker Leesor Teerathep Winothai and a limited B+L x Khaki Bros merchandise collection. Gifts-with-purchase at KT Optic stores: towel at THB 699 spend, limited-edition cap at THB 1999, polo shirt at THB 2499. Campaign runs June 1 2026 while stocks last. Premium-optician channel and local-sports-celebrity play targeting younger Thai urban consumers — distinct from mass online discounting. No equivalent World Cup-timed campaign found from Alcon or Acuvue in Thai press.

headline: Acuvue HK new-wearer trial programme at distributor partners Q2 2026
summary: New MyACUVUE members can book an eye assessment at participating ACUVUE distributor for a basic exam fee and redeem a 30-lens trial pack. Registration open April 1 – June 30 2026; limited to one welcome offer per new member at participating specialty distributors. Defends new-wearer acquisition funnel through prescriber/distributor network rather than open-market discounting — a different playbook from B+L's retail-celebrity push in Thailand running in the same quarter.
